title: Mace PvP +
description: The ultimate texture pack for mace pvp in minecraft.
body: 💎 MACE PvP + | The Ultimate 1.21 Competitive PackTitle: MACE PvP + | CIT Custom Maces, Animated Items, & Low ShieldDescription:MACE PvP + is the ultimate $1.21$ resource pack built for competitive dominance! It combines top-tier PvP optimization with necessary aesthetic mods for a superior combat experience.⚔️ Core Competitive Edge:Low Side Shield: The shield model is lowered and positioned to the side, ensuring maximum visibility during blocking so you never lose sight of your opponent.Clean Crystal: Features a simplified, low-distraction texture for the End Crystal, making it easier to aim at and reducing screen clutter during critical crystal PvP fights.Low-Fire & Clean Particles: Essential optimizations for smooth FPS and minimal screen obstruction.✨ Animated & Custom Features (Requires CIT Resewn):The + in our name is for premium content unlocked via the CIT Resewn mod:🔨 CIT Custom Maces: Unique, high-detail textures for the Mace, giving the 1.21 power weapon the look it deserves.✨ Animated Totem: A mesmerizing, fluid animation for the Totem of Undying.💨 Animated Wind Charge: A dynamic texture for the Wind Charge item, enhancing its look in your inventory.⚠️ NOTE: You MUST have the CIT Resewn mod installed to activate the custom Mace textures.
